name_en: 😘5BB172MiuMiu Cherry New Size Briefcase, latest two-tone design, made of top-grade imported calfskin, smooth and delicate texture, cotton satin lining. This bag is cool, capturing an exquisite multi-functional design that blends menswear and womenswear elements. Casual and lazy, natural and free-spirited, full of personality. Extra-large capacity yet lightweight, simple yet not simplistic. The new size offers better fit; almost every fashion blogger has one.
